UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HART, DAVID L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAREDES, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 950 NEWHALL ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522

DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT WERE REQUESTED AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE PAREDES. THIS DEFENDANT HAS NOT APPEARED ON THE BASIS OF THE FILED PAPERS. AN INDIVIDUAL NAMED TONY PAREDES HAS MADE ALL APPEARANCES. SINCE JOSE PAREDES HAS NOT APPEARED AND TONY PAREDES IS NOT NAMED IN THE COMPLAINT, DEFAULT AND JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE PAREDES WERE ENTERED ON APPLICATION OF PLAINTIFF. CCP 1169.

PER DIEM HOLDOVER OF $60.00 PER DAY.
